description: Lock corporation_limited_liability to mid-19th-century statutory limited-liability company incorporation, not modern LLCs, generic corporate capitalism, banking, or patent systems.

checks.reason: The scoped node is anchored to the UK Limited Liability Act 1855, with the 1856 Joint Stock Companies Act as consolidation and registration framework.
Limited liability requires statutory company law, but ancient codified law is broad legal infrastructure rather than the direct historical invention.
The mid-1850s statutes applied limited liability through joint-stock company law and registration.
Banking is broader finance context and was not a direct prerequisite for general limited-liability company incorporation.
Patent systems are not a direct prerequisite for statutory company registration with limited liability.
